completed_work: Recorded that manifest-connected advisor diagnostics are opt-in and diagnostic-only.
Prepared SELF_MODEL and self-model tests for completed plans = 5 and supported warrants = 10.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260706-0004 is completed and has no remaining implementation work.
Advisor diagnostics remain opt-in metadata and do not alter selected context items or provider prompts.
Automatic L0 inclusion or adapter behavior still requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
next_actions: Start a new governed slice only if automatic L0 inclusion, selection adapters, retrieval, embeddings, prompt changes, or index/store mutation are desired.
risks: Advisor suggestions may still be misread as automatic selection unless future documentation and CLIs preserve the advisory-only wording.
summary_text: Commits 09f0794 and e3fb7b4 implemented PLAN-20260706-0004, and the current completion slice records VERIFY-20260706-0004 and WARR-20260706-0008 against HEAD e3fb7b4. The completed work connects the read-only L0 discovery advisor to context-pack manifest diagnostics as an opt-in diagnostic-only path. ContextPackManifest now supports optional diagnostics metadata, context_pack_builder can emit manifest.diagnostics.l0_discovery_advisor from existing read-only l0_candidate_diagnostics, and scripts/build_context_pack.py exposes --include-l0-discovery-advisor-diagnostics plus an optional suggestion cap. Default behavior remains unchanged: diagnostics are omitted unless explicitly requested, provider prompt rendering is unchanged, ContextPackManifest.items is not mutated, no automatic include_l0 behavior is introduced, and there is no live retrieval, embedding creation, index/store mutation, token-budget telemetry/enforcement, non-none reranking, or adapter behavior.
